product_overview: Admin-facing portal for managing landing content, batches, users, test series, academic mappings and prospect queries with strict role enforcement and media lifecycle controls.
core_goals: Provide secure, role-restricted admin access and session handling.
Enable full CRUD and lifecycle management for landing-page content, batches, students, faculty, and tests.
Support test-authoring workflows with autosave, media uploads, publish/force-live and insights.
Manage academic mappings (subjects, chapters, notes, timetables) with safe file handling and storage lifecycle.
Receive and process public prospect queries from the landing page and allow status updates.

features.name: Authentication and Authorization
features.description: Admin login validates credentials and role, redirects to admin workspace, and enforces access control for admin-only routes.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill password field -> Click Login button -> Receive successful authentication with admin role -> Redirect to /admin/Dashboard -> See admin dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email field -> Fill incorrect password -> Click Login button -> See inline error on invalid credentials -> Remain on /login
Navigate to /admin/TestSeries -> Not authenticated -> See redirect to /login or access denied message

features.name: Landing Page Management (LPM)
features.description: Admin can add, edit, and remove landing page courses, showcase entries, achievers and images with uploads stored to landing-page bucket and replaced images removed from storage.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/LPM -> Click Add Course -> Fill course title field -> Upload image file under 5MB -> Click Save -> See success toast -> Navigate to /get-started -> See updated course entry
Navigate to /admin/LPM -> Click Add Course -> Upload image file larger than 5MB -> Click Save -> See file size error message -> Replace with valid file -> Click Save -> See success toast

features.name: Batch Management
features.description: Admin can create, edit, inactivate, assign students/faculty and delete batches with restrictions preventing permanent delete of active batches.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/Batches -> Click Create Batch -> Fill batch name and details -> Select subject mapping -> Click Create -> See new batch listed
Navigate to /admin/Batches -> Click created batch -> Click Assign Faculty -> Select faculty members -> Click Save -> See assignment saved

Navigate to /admin/Batches -> Click Delete on active batch -> See confirmation modal -> Click Confirm -> See error 'Cannot delete active batch' -> Click Inactivate batch -> Click Delete -> Click Confirm -> See deletion success

features.name: User Directory Management (Students & Faculty)
features.description: Admin can perform full CRUD on student and faculty records; new user creation surfaces initial password to admin and student detail supports admin-specific remarks.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/Students -> Click Add Student -> Fill name field -> Fill email field -> Fill phone field -> Click Create -> See initial password displayed to admin
Navigate to /admin/Students -> Open student detail -> Edit admin remark field -> Click Save -> Reopen student detail -> See admin remark persisted
Navigate to /admin/Students -> Click Add Student -> Leave email field empty -> Click Create -> See inline validation error -> Fill email field -> Click Create -> See success toast

features.name: Faculty Review Session Control
features.description: Admin can trigger a global, time-bound (3-day) faculty review session which resets current faculty ratings and surfaces sticky notifications to students while the window is active.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/ReviewSession -> Click Start Review Session -> Confirm start -> See success toast 'Review session started' -> System resets current faculty ratings -> Navigate to /student/home -> See sticky notification about active review session
Navigate to /admin/ReviewSession -> Click Start Review Session -> See error 'Review session already active' -> Choose Cancel or Extend option

features.name: Test Series Administration
features.description: Admin can author tests using a 3-stage wizard (Setup -> Add Questions -> Publish) with continuous draft autosave, media support for questions/options/explanations, ability to force-live upcoming tests, and view insights for completed attempts.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/TestSeries -> Click Create Test -> Fill setup fields -> Click Next -> Click Add Question -> Fill question text -> Upload question image -> Observe autosave success indicator -> Click Next -> Review test -> Click Publish -> See test listed as Live

Navigate to /admin/TestSeries -> Click Create Test -> Click Add Question -> Upload question file with unsupported extension -> See invalid extension error -> Remove file -> Upload supported file -> Observe autosave error due to network -> See autosave error banner -> Click Retry Save -> Observe autosave success

features.name: Batch Academic Mapping (subjects, chapters, notes, timetables)
features.description: Within a batch context, admin can add subjects and chapters, upload notes (<=50MB), post batch notices, and upload timetable images to the timetables storage bucket.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin/Batches -> Click batch -> Click Subjects tab -> Click Add Subject -> Fill subject name -> Click Save -> See subject listed
Navigate to /admin/Batches -> Click batch -> Click Chapters -> Click Add Chapter -> Fill chapter title -> Upload notes file under 50MB -> Click Save -> See notes upload success
Navigate to /admin/Batches -> Click batch -> Click Timetable -> Click Upload Timetable Image -> Upload image file -> Click Save -> See timetable image stored and visible
Navigate to /admin/Batches -> Click batch -> Click Chapters -> Click Add Chapter -> Upload notes file larger than 50MB -> Click Save -> See file size error

features.name: Query Management (Public interest form submissions)
features.description: Admin can review prospect queries submitted from the public landing page, update statuses, and review contact details; public submissions are captured via the landing GET STARTED form.
user_flows: Navigate to /get-started -> Fill name field -> Fill email field -> Fill phone field -> Fill course field -> Click Submit -> See success feedback on submission -> Navigate to /admin/Queries -> Open newest query -> Click Update Status -> Select 'Contacted' -> Click Save -> See status updated
Navigate to /get-started -> Fill name field -> Fill invalid email field -> Click Submit -> See inline validation error on email -> Correct email -> Click Submit -> See success feedback
Navigate to /admin/Queries -> Open query -> Click Update Status -> If logged in as non-admin -> See forbidden error and unable to save status

routes.description: Public landing page and lead capture form.
Student dashboard with home, tests, profile, and question bank tabs.

features.name: Public Interest Form Submission
features.description: Captures user enquiry submissions from the landing page.
user_interactions: Fill name, email, phone, and course fields.

features.name: Role Based Authentication
features.description: Logs in users and redirects by role to student, faculty, or admin areas.
user_interactions: See inline error on invalid credentials.
Land on role-specific dashboard on success.

features.name: Student Test Lifecycle
features.description: Supports test list, attempt, autosave, submission, and analytics.
user_interactions: Save progress and submit final attempt.

known_limitations.issue: Frontend routing and access checks are mostly role/state driven.
known_limitations.impact: Tests must establish role and session preconditions before route assertions.
